title: Anyone know of any Upcoming Blue ray Releases
display_title: Anyone know of any Upcoming Blue ray Releases
wikitext:
[]: Anyone know of any Upcoming Blue ray Releases?             Quote Post by Dark_Firestar » Thu Apr 07, 2011 6:46 pm I want to buy the Platinum Collection, EoE, and Death and Rebirth. But wondering if they are planning to get them released in blue ray?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Apr 07, 2011 6:55 pm So far, no plans. Check out these threads for more info: End Of Evangelion Reanimated or just Blu Ray? [urk=http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=10206]Blu-Ray Re-Release[/url] Evangelion TV series to get Blu-Ray release?
